sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date DateTime, event_duration Float32);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00'), 5.0), (2, toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00'), 10.0), (3, NULL, NULL);
SELECT id, addYears(event_date, 1) AS new_date, event_duration - 2.0 AS reduced_duration FROM test_dates WHERE event_duration IS NOT NULL;

WITH (SELECT addYears(toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00'), event_duration) FROM test_dates WHERE event_duration IS NOT NULL) AS future_dates SELECT id, addYears(event_date, 1) AS incremented_date, (event_date - toDateTime('2022-12-31 00:00:00')) AS days_diff FROM test_dates;

SELECT id, new_date, event_duration FROM (SELECT id, addYears(event_date, CAST(event_duration AS Int32)) AS new_date, event_duration FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL) AS derived_table WHERE new_date IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE users (user_id Int32, created_at Date, last_login DateTime, login_count UInt32);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, toDate('2023-01-01'), toDateTime('2024-01-01 08:30:00'), 5), (2, toDate('2022-01-01'), NULL, NULL);
SELECT user_id, addYears(created_at, login_count) AS account_age, last_login - addYears(created_at, login_count) AS days_since_creation FROM users WHERE last_login IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_events AS SELECT event_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_date, addYears(event_date, 2) - toDate('2025-01-01') AS diff_years FROM (SELECT * FROM temp_events) AS events_with_diff WHERE diff_years > 0;
